theme.en: AI Demand Pulls the Memory Stack Tight

dek.en: Today’s edition is less about one chip launch than the strain around it: memory prices, equipment spending, export enforcement, and data-center components are all reacting to AI infrastructure demand. The same pull is visible from HBM materials to older DDR2 supply and from cloud GPU deployments to chiplet research.
dek.zh: 今天的主线不是单一芯片发布，而是围绕AI基础设施需求形成的供应链压力：存储价格、设备投资、出口执法和数据中心元件都在同步反应。从HBM材料到老旧DDR2供给，再到云端GPU部署和chiplet研究，这条拉力已经贯穿整个堆栈。

title.en: AI & Accelerators
title.zh: AI与加速器

title.en: Nvidia Blackwell Ultra GB300 powers Anthropic Claude on Microsoft Azure
title.zh: Nvidia Blackwell Ultra GB300在Microsoft Azure上支撑Anthropic Claude

summary.en: Anthropic’s Claude models are now generally available on Microsoft Azure using Nvidia’s Blackwell Ultra GB300 platform. The deployment matters because it ties one of the largest model providers to Nvidia’s latest rack-scale GPU generation inside a hyperscale cloud, with billing and authentication handled through Azure. It also keeps the focus on inference capacity rather than only on training clusters.
summary.zh: Anthropic的Claude模型已在Microsoft Azure上正式可用，底层使用Nvidia Blackwell Ultra GB300平台。这个部署的意义在于，它把一家头部模型公司与Nvidia最新一代机架级GPU平台绑定到超大规模云服务中，并由Azure处理计费和认证。它也说明行业焦点正在从训练集群延伸到大规模推理容量。

title.en: AMD EPYC 8005 Sorano reshapes the SP6 server platform
title.zh: AMD EPYC 8005 Sorano重塑SP6服务器平台

summary.en: ServeTheHome says AMD’s EPYC 8005 “Sorano” represents a major generational change for the SP6 server socket. The story is relevant to AI infrastructure because dense, lower-power server CPUs increasingly frame how storage, networking, and accelerator nodes are composed around GPUs. It is not a GPU launch, but it affects the platform layer that sits beside accelerator deployments.
summary.zh: ServeTheHome称，AMD EPYC 8005 “Sorano”对SP6服务器插槽来说是一次重要的代际变化。它与AI基础设施相关，因为高密度、低功耗服务器CPU正在影响GPU周边的存储、网络和加速器节点如何组合。它不是GPU发布，但会影响加速器部署旁边的平台层。

title.en: Foundry & Manufacturing
title.zh: 晶圆代工与制造

title.en: China’s Nexchip seeks up to $890.3 million in Hong Kong share sale
title.zh: 中国晶合集成拟在香港募资最高8.903亿美元

summary.en: China’s Nexchip Semiconductor is seeking as much as $890.3 million through a Hong Kong share sale, according to the Reuters-syndicated candidate. A successful deal would add capital for a domestic foundry supplier at a time when China is still trying to deepen local manufacturing capacity. The size is not TSMC-scale, but it is material for a regional foundry expansion story.
summary.zh: 据候选列表中的Reuters转发稿，中国晶合集成计划通过香港售股筹集最高8.903亿美元。若交易完成，将为一家本土晶圆代工供应商补充资本，而中国仍在推动本地制造能力加深。这个规模无法与TSMC相比，但对区域性代工扩张来说仍具实质意义。

title.en: South Korea chip hub wins Samsung and SK Hynix backing
title.zh: 韩国半导体枢纽获得Samsung与SK hynix支持

summary.en: A South Korean chip hub has received backing from Samsung and SK Hynix, according to eeNews Europe. The story points to Korea’s effort to keep manufacturing, materials, and talent clustered around its dominant memory suppliers. Regional hub policy matters because HBM and advanced DRAM ramps depend on more than just tool orders; they also need trained labor and local supplier density.
summary.zh: 据eeNews Europe报道，韩国一处半导体枢纽获得Samsung和SK hynix支持。这反映出韩国希望围绕其主导存储厂商继续聚集制造、材料和人才。区域枢纽政策值得关注，因为HBM和先进DRAM扩产不只依赖设备订单，也依赖熟练劳动力和本地供应商密度。

title.en: Memory
title.zh: 存储

title.en: Consumer DRAM shortage spreads to DDR2 products
title.zh: 消费级DRAM短缺蔓延至DDR2产品

summary.en: TrendForce estimates DDR2 contract prices will rise about 55-60% in 2Q 2026 and another 35-40% in 3Q, according to EE Times Asia. That is a striking move for a legacy memory generation and shows how AI-driven capacity allocation can tighten older supply categories. The pressure may hit industrial, embedded, and long-life electronics customers harder than headline AI server buyers.
summary.zh: 据EE Times Asia援引TrendForce估计，DDR2合约价将在2026年第二季度上涨约55-60%，第三季度再涨35-40%。对于一个老旧存储世代来说，这个涨幅很大，说明AI需求牵动产能配置后，较老产品线也会被挤紧。受冲击的可能不是头部AI服务器客户，而是工业、嵌入式和长生命周期电子客户。

title.en: Apple’s reported CXMT memory plan may run into Beijing’s domestic-priority calculus
title.zh: Apple据称采购CXMT存储的计划或受北京国内优先逻辑影响

summary.en: A Korea Investment & Securities view cited by Wccftech argues that CXMT may be unable to materially reshape the global memory market, even as Apple reportedly looks for shortage relief. The report says Beijing could prioritize domestic chip-starved customers over foreign buyers if CXMT supply is tight. The story matters because it turns memory sourcing into a policy and allocation question, not just a price negotiation.
summary.zh: Wccftech援引Korea Investment & Securities观点称，即便Apple据称寻求缓解存储短缺，CXMT也未必能对全球存储市场产生决定性影响。报道还称，如果CXMT供给紧张，北京可能优先满足国内缺芯客户，而不是海外买家。这个故事的重要性在于，存储采购不再只是价格谈判，也变成政策与配额分配问题。

title.en: Equipment & Materials
title.zh: 设备与材料

title.en: SEMI sees 300 mm memory equipment investment topping $50 billion in 2026
title.zh: SEMI预计2026年300mm存储设备投资超过500亿美元

summary.en: SEMI projects 300 mm memory equipment investment will surpass $50 billion in 2026, according to the TechPowerUp candidate. That forecast captures how HBM, DRAM, and NAND suppliers are converting AI demand into tool orders rather than just higher spot prices. It also gives equipment makers a concrete memory-cycle number to plan around after a volatile capex period.
summary.zh: 据TechPowerUp候选稿，SEMI预计2026年300mm存储设备投资将超过500亿美元。这个预测说明HBM、DRAM和NAND供应商正在把AI需求转化为设备订单，而不仅仅是现货价格上涨。经历一段资本开支波动期后，这也为设备厂商提供了一个更具体的存储周期参考数。

title.en: Dynamic Solution starts building silica slurry plant for HBM and AI chips
title.zh: Dynamic Solution开建面向HBM和AI芯片的硅溶胶浆料工厂

summary.en: Dynamic Solution has begun construction of a silica slurry plant positioned as a key material source for HBM and AI semiconductors. Slurry is a less visible part of the stack than lithography or bonding tools, but CMP material availability still shapes yield, throughput, and cost in advanced memory manufacturing. The item is a reminder that the HBM ramp pulls on specialty chemicals as well as wafers and tools.
summary.zh: Dynamic Solution已开始建设一座硅溶胶浆料工厂，定位于为HBM和AI半导体提供关键材料。浆料不像光刻机或键合设备那样显眼，但CMP材料供应仍会影响先进存储制造的良率、吞吐和成本。这条新闻提醒人们，HBM扩产拉动的不只是晶圆和设备，也包括专用化学材料。

title.en: Policy & Geopolitics
title.zh: 政策与地缘政治

title.en: Taiwan raids Super Micro offices in Nvidia GPU smuggling investigation
title.zh: 台湾在Nvidia GPU走私调查中搜查Super Micro办公室

summary.en: Taiwanese authorities raided locations tied to a GPU smuggling investigation, and Super Micro said it was cooperating after one of its offices appeared in the prosecutor’s list. The probe centers on Nvidia chips allegedly moving into China despite export restrictions. This is a material enforcement story because controls only change supply behavior when customs, prosecutors, and distributors face real scrutiny.
summary.zh: 台湾检方围绕GPU走私调查搜查多处地点，Super Micro在其一处办公室出现在检方名单后表示正在配合。调查焦点是Nvidia芯片是否在出口限制下流入中国。这个故事的重要性在于，出口管制只有在海关、检方和分销环节都承受实际审查时，才会真正改变供应行为。

title.en: Challengers & New Silicon
title.zh: 新势力与新硅

title.en: Reed Semiconductor raises $100 million for AI power solutions
title.zh: Reed Semiconductor为AI电源方案融资1亿美元

summary.en: Reed Semiconductor raised $100 million to expand its AI power-solutions business, according to citybiz. Power delivery is becoming a more strategic part of accelerator-system design as racks push higher current and thermal density. The financing is early-stage signal rather than proof of deployed silicon, but the amount is large enough to watch in the challenger layer.
summary.zh: 据citybiz报道，Reed Semiconductor融资1亿美元，用于扩展其AI电源方案业务。随着机架电流和热密度继续上升，供电正在成为加速器系统设计中更具战略性的环节。这笔融资还只是早期信号，并不等同于已部署硅产品，但金额足够使其进入新势力观察范围。

theme.en: Hardware Workloads Move Closer to the Metal
theme.zh: 硬件工作负载贴近底层

dek.en: This week’s papers emphasize measurement and co-design: Blackwell video encoders, phone NPUs, real-time RISC-V cores, chiplet placement, and EDA agents all move beyond abstract models. Several results are still simulation-heavy, but the useful thread is the same: software decisions are being pulled into hardware constraints earlier.
dek.zh: 本周论文强调测量与协同设计：Blackwell视频编码器、手机NPU、实时RISC-V核心、chiplet布局和EDA agent都在从抽象模型走向更贴近硬件的评估。部分结果仍偏仿真，但有价值的主线一致：软件决策正在更早地受到硬件约束牵引。

title.en: Devices & Process
title.zh: 器件与工艺

title.en: NEMS primitives for hardware security in advanced packaging
title.zh: 面向先进封装硬件安全的NEMS原语

papers.authors: H. R. Kottur, P. Arjunamahanthi, M. S. M. Khan, et al.

summary.en: Kottur et al. frame nanoelectromechanical systems as physical security primitives for advanced packaging, including PUFs, resonance fingerprints, shape-memory materials, and physical unlocking mechanisms. The useful angle is that packaging security needs device-level assurance, not only digital cryptographic wrappers. The paper reads as a technology-mapping proposal rather than a measured manufacturing result, so the next proof point is integration data in a standard semiconductor flow.
summary.zh: Kottur等人将纳机电系统（NEMS）定义为先进封装中的物理安全原语，包括PUF、谐振指纹、形状记忆材料和物理解锁机制。它的有价值之处在于指出封装安全需要器件级保证，而不只是数字密码学外壳。这篇论文更像技术路线映射，而不是已验证的制造结果，下一步需要在标准半导体流程中的集成数据。

title.en: Circuits & Architecture
title.zh: 电路与架构

title.en: SHIFT relocates compute in communication-aware chiplet systems
title.zh: SHIFT在通信感知chiplet系统中迁移计算

papers.authors: A. Delavari, L. Popryho, I. Partin-Vaisband, et al.

summary.en: Delavari et al. propose SHIFT, a topology-agnostic runtime method that moves compute context toward a better-positioned node instead of only routing data around a chiplet fabric. The design uses utility chiplets, multi-layer routing, a modified shortest-path algorithm, and a lightweight ML policy for traffic adaptivity. The paper is simulation-oriented, but it targets a real scaling issue: chiplet systems increasingly pay for data motion more than arithmetic.
summary.zh: Delavari等人提出SHIFT，这是一种拓扑无关的运行时方法，不只是把数据绕过chiplet互连，而是将计算上下文迁移到位置更合适的节点。该设计使用utility chiplet、多层路由、修改版最短路径算法和轻量ML策略来适应流量变化。论文以仿真为主，但瞄准了真实扩展问题：chiplet系统越来越多地为数据移动而不是算术本身付出代价。

title.en: CVA6-RT adds time-predictable real-time features to an open RV64 core
title.zh: CVA6-RT为开放RV64核心加入时间可预测实时特性

papers.authors: E. Zelioli, C. Reinwardt, N. Wistoff, et al.

summary.en: Zelioli et al. extend the open-source CVA6 core with TLB partitioning and locking, scratchpad-style L1 cache modes, and low-latency interrupt handling with hardware-assisted context stacking. With real-time features enabled, CVA6-RT reaches 12-cycle interrupt latency, about 10x lower than baseline CVA6 and comparable to simpler Arm Cortex-M microcontrollers. The result is relevant for mixed-criticality systems that want Linux-class RISC-V openness without giving up deterministic response.
summary.zh: Zelioli等人为开源CVA6核心加入TLB分区与锁定、可重构scratchpad式L1缓存模式，以及带硬件辅助上下文堆栈的低延迟中断处理。启用实时特性后，CVA6-RT实现12周期中断延迟，比基线CVA6低约10倍，并可与更简单的Arm Cortex-M微控制器相当。这个结果适合希望保留Linux级RISC-V开放性、同时又需要确定性响应的混合关键系统。

title.en: Croc turns open-source silicon education into fabricated RISC-V chips
title.zh: Croc将开源硅设计教学推进到已制造RISC-V芯片

papers.authors: E. Zelioli, P. Sauter, T. Benz, et al.

summary.en: Zelioli et al. present Croc, an end-to-end open-source RISC-V SoC design and fabrication flow built around open SystemVerilog IP and a 130 nm open PDK. In the first course run, 65 students completed 33 projects, 30 produced manufacturable layouts, 18 were tapeout candidates, and five were fabricated; a baseline chip has already been characterized in silicon. The paper matters less as a leading-node result than as evidence that open flows can teach full-stack chip design with real silicon feedback.
summary.zh: Zelioli等人介绍Croc，这是一个围绕开源SystemVerilog IP和130nm开放PDK构建的端到端开源RISC-V SoC设计与制造流程。在首次课程实践中，65名学生完成33个项目，其中30个生成可制造版图，18个成为流片候选，5个完成制造；一个基线芯片已完成硅上表征。它的重要性不在先进制程，而在证明开源流程可以通过真实硅反馈训练完整芯片设计能力。

title.en: AI Accelerators & Compute-in-Memory
title.zh: AI加速器与存算一体

title.en: Blackwell hardware encoders make high-fidelity V-PCC practical on general GPUs
title.zh: Blackwell硬件编码器让高保真V-PCC可在通用GPU上实现

summary.en: Arunruangsirilert and Katto evaluate 8K, 10-bit, 4:2:2 HEVC encoding for video-based point-cloud compression on a commercial Nvidia Blackwell GPU with four on-die hardware encoders. The novelty is not a new codec, but showing that a workload previously pushed toward custom ASICs can move onto general-purpose GPU hardware because Blackwell adds the needed 10-bit 4:2:2 path. The result is workload-specific, but it is a concrete example of fixed-function blocks changing the accelerator boundary.
summary.zh: Arunruangsirilert和Katto在一块商用Nvidia Blackwell GPU上评估面向视频点云压缩的8K、10-bit、4:2:2 HEVC编码，该GPU包含4个片上硬件编码器。新意不在新编解码器，而在说明过去偏向定制ASIC的工作负载，因为Blackwell加入所需的10-bit 4:2:2路径，可以转移到通用GPU硬件上。这个结果具有工作负载特定性，但它清楚展示了固定功能模块如何改变加速器边界。

title.en: Mobile VLM inference depends sharply on phase and backend placement
title.zh: 移动端VLM推理强烈依赖阶段与后端映射

papers.authors: A. V. Murthy, Y. N. Kotre, P. Sharma, et al.

summary.en: Murthy et al. characterize vision-language inference on a Snapdragon 8 Elite-class mobile SoC using hardware-in-the-loop measurements. The NPU gives a 1.64x speedup for prefill but only 1.18x for decode, while vision encoders see 20-45x CPU speedups; the best paths cut steady-state temperature by 10.47 degrees C and energy by 2.52x. The paper is useful because it turns “run it on the NPU” into a phase-by-phase mapping problem for on-device AI.
summary.zh: Murthy等人使用硬件在环测量，表征Snapdragon 8 Elite级移动SoC上的视觉语言模型推理。NPU在prefill阶段带来1.64倍加速，但在decode阶段只有1.18倍；视觉编码器相对CPU有20-45倍加速，最佳路径使稳态温度降低10.47摄氏度、能耗降低2.52倍。论文的价值在于把「跑在NPU上」拆解成按阶段映射的移动端AI问题。

title.en: MSDF digit-serial arithmetic accelerates U-Net convolution on FPGA
title.zh: MSDF数字串行算术在FPGA上加速U-Net卷积

papers.authors: M. Usman, Y. Sadegheih, D. Merhof

summary.en: Usman et al. build an FPGA convolution accelerator for U-Net that uses most-significant-digit-first digit-serial arithmetic and a merged multiply-add pipeline. The merged unit avoids accumulating startup latency from cascaded multiply and add blocks, improving throughput despite lower FPGA clock frequency than a CPU. The work is narrower than a full accelerator SoC, but it is a concrete arithmetic-level optimization for energy-constrained segmentation workloads.
summary.zh: Usman等人为U-Net构建FPGA卷积加速器，采用最高有效位优先（MSDF）的数字串行算术和融合乘加流水线。融合单元避免了乘法和加法模块级联时启动延迟不断累积的问题，即便FPGA频率低于CPU，也能提升吞吐。该工作比完整加速器SoC范围更窄，但它是面向能耗受限分割工作负载的具体算术级优化。

title.en: AI Research for Hardware
title.zh: 面向硬件的AI研究

title.en: KernelSight-LM simulates LLM inference at kernel-level granularity
title.zh: KernelSight-LM以kernel级粒度模拟LLM推理

papers.authors: X. Yao, T. Kim, H. Pei, et al.

summary.en: Yao et al. present KernelSight-LM, an LLM inference simulator that decomposes serving into kernel roofline models, learned efficiency terms, communication, host overhead, prefix caching, and continuous batching. In a cross-generation setting with no target-GPU measurements, it predicts per-kernel latency on an unseen GPU generation at 12.1% error, versus 22.0% for a roofline baseline. The simulator is useful for hardware planning because inference bottlenecks are now shaped by serving policy as much as raw FLOPS.
summary.zh: Yao等人提出KernelSight-LM，这是一个LLM推理模拟器，将服务过程拆解为kernel roofline模型、学习得到的效率项、通信、主机开销、prefix caching和continuous batching。在没有目标GPU测量数据的跨代设置中，它对未见GPU世代的单kernel延迟预测误差为12.1%，而roofline基线为22.0%。该模拟器对硬件规划有用，因为推理瓶颈如今既受原始FLOPS影响，也受服务策略影响。

title.en: EDA & Design Automation
title.zh: EDA与设计自动化

title.en: HORIZON treats hardware design as repository-level code evolution
title.zh: HORIZON将硬件设计视为仓库级代码演化

papers.authors: C. Yu, C. Deng, N. Pinckney, et al.

summary.en: Yu et al. introduce HORIZON, a self-evolving agent framework that packages hardware-design tasks into repositories with domain knowledge, executable evaluators, acceptance predicates, and git/runtime policy. The system reports 100% benchmark completion across ChipBench, RTLLM, Verilog-Eval, and nine CVDP categories. The authors are explicit that these are controlled proxies, so the result is best read as progress in evaluation harnesses and agent workflow, not proof that autonomous chip design is solved.
summary.zh: Yu等人提出HORIZON，这是一个自演化agent框架，把硬件设计任务封装为包含领域知识、可执行评测器、验收条件以及git/运行时策略的代码仓库。系统在ChipBench、RTLLM、Verilog-Eval和9类CVDP任务上报告100%基准完成率。作者明确指出这些仍是受控代理任务，因此应将其理解为评测框架和agent工作流的进展，而不是自主芯片设计已被解决的证明。

title.en: Evidence-driven LLM agents repair C into synthesizable HLS code
title.zh: 证据驱动LLM agent将C修复为可综合HLS代码

papers.authors: Z. Zhao, H. Lang, Z. Xiao, et al.

summary.en: Zhao et al. cast C-to-HLS-C conversion as a closed-loop generation, verification, diagnosis, and repair problem around Xilinx Vitis. Their workflow uses a four-stage verifier, Progressive Mismatch Localization Chain, AST slicing, dual-trace instrumentation, and a typed evidence RAG system instead of handing raw logs directly to an LLM. The result matters for EDA because HLS productivity depends less on first-shot code generation than on reproducible repair through compile, CSim, synthesis, and CoSim stages.
summary.zh: Zhao等人将C到HLS-C转换定义为围绕Xilinx Vitis的生成、验证、诊断和修复闭环问题。其流程使用四阶段验证器、Progressive Mismatch Localization Chain、AST切片、双轨迹插桩和类型化证据RAG系统，而不是直接把原始日志交给LLM。该结果对EDA有意义，因为HLS生产力并不主要取决于一次性生成代码，而取决于能否在编译、CSim、综合和CoSim阶段可复现地修复问题。
